name: Flautas De Pollo (Chicken Flautas)
recipeIngredient: 1 Whole chicken breast, remove and shred
2 Tablespoons Olive Oil, Salt to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small pan, sauté the garlic and onion in oil until translucent. Add the tomato and pepper and continue frying. Add the chicken, salt, and pepper. Fry for 3-4 more minutes. Remove from heat.
2. Heat corn oil about 1 inch deep on medium-high heat. Use good quality, thin tortillas that are 6-7 inches long. Place a heaping tablespoon of filling in each tortilla. Roll tightly and secure with 3-4 toothpicks. Fry until the tortillas are golden brown.
3. To make guacamole: Toast garlic clove and small hot green pepper. Remove skin, mash together with one peeled avocado. Add remaining avocados, minced cilantro, diced onion, and salt/pepper. Serve.
